vsplit_initial.label: vsplit_initial
vsplit_initial.description: Vertical split, right pane active, 'RIGHT' echoed

vsplit_after_h.label: vsplit_after_h
vsplit_after_h.description: After Ctrl-B h: left pane active, 'LEFT' echoed

vsplit_after_l.label: vsplit_after_l
vsplit_after_l.description: After Ctrl-B l: right pane active, 'BACK_RIGHT' echoed

hsplit_initial.label: hsplit_initial
hsplit_initial.description: Horizontal split, bottom pane active, 'BOTTOM' echoed

hsplit_after_k.label: hsplit_after_k
hsplit_after_k.description: After Ctrl-B k: top pane active, 'TOP' echoed

hsplit_after_j.label: hsplit_after_j
hsplit_after_j.description: After Ctrl-B j: bottom pane active, 'BACK_BOTTOM' echoed

three_panes_labeled.label: three_panes_labeled
three_panes_labeled.description: Three panes labeled: L (left), TR (top-right), BR (bottom-right)

three_panes_l_from_left.label: three_panes_l_from_left
three_panes_l_from_left.description: After l from left pane: moved to a right pane

three_panes_j_down.label: three_panes_j_down
three_panes_j_down.description: After j: moved down within right column

grid_labeled.label: grid_labeled
grid_labeled.description: 2x2 grid labeled: TL, TR, BL, BR

grid_h_to_bl.label: grid_h_to_bl
grid_h_to_bl.description: After h from BR: now in BL (or closest left pane)

grid_k_to_tl.label: grid_k_to_tl
grid_k_to_tl.description: After k from BL: now in TL

grid_l_to_tr.label: grid_l_to_tr
grid_l_to_tr.description: After l from TL: now in TR

grid_j_to_br.label: grid_j_to_br
grid_j_to_br.description: After j from TR: now in BR

deep_vsplit_leftmost.label: deep_vsplit_leftmost
deep_vsplit_leftmost.description: 4 vertical panes, in leftmost after 3x h

deep_vsplit_rightmost.label: deep_vsplit_rightmost
deep_vsplit_rightmost.description: 4 vertical panes, in rightmost after 3x l

deep_hsplit_top.label: deep_hsplit_top
deep_hsplit_top.description: 4 horizontal panes, in topmost after 3x k

deep_hsplit_bottom.label: deep_hsplit_bottom
deep_hsplit_bottom.description: 4 horizontal panes, in bottommost after 3x j

nested_labeled.label: nested_labeled
nested_labeled.description: Nested splits labeled: TL, BLL, BLR, R

lastwin_toggle_back.label: lastwin_toggle_back
lastwin_toggle_back.description: After Ctrl-B L: back in window 0

lastwin_toggle_again.label: lastwin_toggle_again
lastwin_toggle_again.description: After second Ctrl-B L: back in window 1

edge_h_at_left.label: edge_h_at_left
edge_h_at_left.description: After h when already at leftmost: still in left pane

edge_l_at_right.label: edge_l_at_right
edge_l_at_right.description: After l when already at rightmost: still in right pane
